tiers.name: National trade — send first
tiers.notes: Highest citation value. Personalize first line with their recent coverage angle.

tiers.name: Cleveland local + Ohio hospitality
tiers.notes: Lead with Agave & Rye field test + Cleveland bartender origin story.

tiers.name: Warm contacts + consultants
tiers.notes: Reference prior conversation if applicable. Shorter, direct ask.

tiers.name: Creators + influencers
tiers.notes: Offer download link + screen recording assets. Ask for honest review, not paid placement.

tiers.name: Round 2 trade follow-up
tiers.notes: Only send to Tier 1 non-responders after 5 business days.

send_checklist: Open draft in Gmail — confirm link points to opensourcebarware.com/download
Add UTM if link is bare: ?utm_source=press&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=launch2026
Mention free + GPLv3 + tested in real restaurant (one line)
Include authority page for editors who want context: /free-bar-inventory-software
Send 10-15 per day max — spread across tiers
Log sent: recipient, date, subject in a reply to yourself or spreadsheet
Track pickups: Google Alerts for 'Open Source Barware' + Search Console links report

follow_up.second_touch_angle: Download count milestone or press pickup from another outlet
